Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class BridgeProxyAttribute

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Assembly-level attribute linking a JsImportAttribute interface to its source-generated proxy implementation class.

[AttributeUsage(AttributeTargets.Assembly, AllowMultiple = true)]
public sealed class BridgeProxyAttribute : Attribute

BridgeProxyAttribute(Type, Type)

Creates a new BridgeProxyAttribute linking an imported interface to its generated proxy type.
